quoted_tweet.text:
⭕ SWARM OF EARTHQUAKES ROCKS AREA 51.

So I just saw reports of a swarm of earthquakes hitting right near Area 51 in Nevada today.

At least 17 quakes since this morning, with the biggest one clocking in at magnitude 4.4. 

They're super shallow, only about 2.5 miles down, which is unusual for the area and makes them feel more intense on the surface. 

Nevada sits in the Basin and Range province, where the crust is stretching and pulling apart so small quakes aren't unheard of. But a cluster this tight and this close to one of the most secretive military bases on the planet? That's got us speculating.

On the conspiracy side, you’ve got underground tests, maybe new drone tech, exotic propulsion or even something nuclear-related.

Shallow quakes can sometimes mimic the seismic signature of explosions, and Area 51 has decades of history with black projects, from stealth aircraft to who knows what. The timing feels convenient especially if they're running classified stuff they don't want eyes on.

Skeptics? They say it's just geology doing its thing. The region has faults all over, and swarms happen naturally when stress releases in a series of smaller events instead of one big one.

No official word yet from the USGS beyond the data and experts note this isn't unprecedented for Nevada. Either way, it's a reminder how much we still don't know about what's really going on out there in the desert.  

What do you think? A tectonic coincidence or something more? 

Let me know below 👇 #area51 #usgs
#earthquakes
